{{Infobox character
| name = King Regent
| aliases = King Regent Felrex, King-Regent Felrex, King Felrex
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = King Regent, King of Karosha, monarch, top Perfected leader, ruler
| affiliations = Horizon, Karoshan fleet
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

''See also: [[King Regent Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[King]] [[Regent]] [[Felrex]] is the current ruler of [[Karosha]], having seized power from [[Queen Shyrax]] through betrayal. A member of a specialized subspecies known as [[the Perfected]], he is considered a usurper by those loyal to the former queen. [[Felrex]]'s primary ambition is the expansion of the [[Iron Legion]] through the invasion of the [[Galactic Union]]. To achieve this, he utilizes a highly protected laboratory beneath his royal palace and relies on [[the Perfected]]—an artificially created ruling caste—to bolster his military strength. His leadership style involves strategic stalling and the use of advanced technology, such as the [[Zenith Cannon]], to build his forces. While he is a formidable combatant capable of matching powerful entities like the D'Niss through magical channeling, his reign is characterized by political instability and opposition from various galactic factions.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[King Regent]] authorized the [[Karoshan commander]] to use a wand.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[King]] [[Regent]] [[Felrex]], the monarch of [[Karosha]], was once a candidate for selection by [[Horizon]]. He is associated with drones observed in the sky and intends to stall the [[D’Niss]] in order to [[construct]] an army of [[Perfected]]. While he watches the duel as a presiding ruler, he is also a figure targeted by the threat posed by [[Varic Vallenar]] and his crew.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Drones in the sky could belong to the [[King Regent]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[King]] [[Felrex]] is a monarch who will watch the duel.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26">''The Knight'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[King]] [[Felrex]] is the [[King]] of [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c29">''The Knight'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[King Regent]] [[Felrex]] was a candidate for selection by [[Horizon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37">''The Knight'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[King Regent]] [[Felrex]] intends to stall the [[D’Niss]] to build an army of [[Perfected]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c38">''The Knight'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[King]] [[Felrex]] is a figure whom [[Varic Vallenar]] and his crew pose a threat to.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[King Regent]] [[Felrex]] is a mutual enemy of the [[Captain]] and [[Solstice]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[King Regent]] [[Felrex]] is a top [[Perfected]] leader who may be waiting with the [[Karoshan fleet]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20">''The Pilot'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[King Regent]] is the ruler being opposed by the [[Rebel Queen]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“The King Regent authorized me to use this wand and granted me Aethertech for my hunt.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|"Any of those drones could belong to the King Regent, and there’s Karoshan magic monitoring the general state of the crowd."<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
